isInSync.description: True if ledger matches actual stock (within 1-unit tolerance)

reconciliationLogId.description: Log ID if discrepancy was created

reason.example: Physical count revealed 5 units were damaged and disposed

isAboveThreshold.description: Whether current margin is above threshold

alertCreated.description: Whether an alert was created during this check

alertId.description: ID of alert created (if alertCreated is true)

createAlertIfBelowThreshold.description: Automatically create alert if profit margin is below threshold

campaignIds.description: Array of campaign IDs to check (max 50)

actionTaken.example: Paused campaign and adjusted discount to 10%

autoPauseEnabled.description: Enable automatic campaign pause when profit margin drops below threshold

pauseThreshold.description: Profit margin percentage threshold for auto-pause (e.g., 10 = 10%)

notificationsEnabled.description: Send alerts to distributor when threshold is breached

alertCheckInterval.description: Seconds between profit checks (min: 60s, max: 1 hour)
